resource_kind.description: The kind of resource (one of elasticsearch, kibana, apm, or integrations_server).

ref_id.description: User-specified RefId for the Resource (or '_main' if there is only one).

instance_ids.description: A comma-separated list of instance identifiers.

ignore_missing.description: If true and the instance does not exist then quietly proceed to the next instance, otherwise treated as an error
